title: Spectral characterization of asteroid 99942 Apophis ahead of its 2029 close approach
author: Smith, Jane
Tanaka, Hiroshi
Müller, Anna
docs.abstract: We present spectroscopic observations of 99942 Apophis obtained at the Very Large Telescope between 2023 and 2024, refining its mineralogical classification and bulk density estimates.

title: Yarkovsky drift and impact-probability evolution of 99942 Apophis after the 2021 radar campaign
author: Davis, R.
Park, S.
Chesley, S. R.
docs.abstract: The 2021 Goldstone-Green Bank radar observations constrained the Yarkovsky semi-major axis drift of 99942 Apophis, allowing impact probability projections to be tightened through 2089.

title: Multi-wavelength survey of potentially hazardous asteroids
author: Lin, K.-Y.
Garcia, P.
docs.abstract: Survey results include observations of (99942) Apophis and 24 other PHAs. Spectral types and rotation periods are reported.
